mapper.select: SELECT tp.*, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM teaching_progress tp LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON tp.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON tp.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON tp.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY tp.id

SELECT tp.*, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM teaching_progress tp LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON tp.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON tp.course_id = co.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON tp.teacher_id = t.id WHERE tp.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_progress (class_id, course_id, teacher_id, chapter, content, planned_date, actual_date, status, remark) VALUES (#{classId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{chapter}, #{content}, #{plannedDate}, #{actualDate}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_progress SET class_id=#{classId}, course_id=#{courseId}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, chapter=#{chapter}, content=#{content}, planned_date=#{plannedDate}, actual_date=#{actualDate}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
